articles.title: $1.3 Billion Digital Asset Management Firm Says Crypto Market Set for Largest Ever Bull Cycle
articles.description: Crypto markets are set for unprecedented growth over the next few years, according to Matt Hougan, Chief Investment Officer of Bitwise Asset Management, who during a recent interview expressed his optimism for digital asset markets, stating he is “especially bullish on the next three years.” During a recent interview on The Wolf of All Streets […]

articles.title: Uniswap wants to launch mobile wallet, but Apple won’t greenlight its launch
articles.description: Despite having its first build approved in October, Uniswap Labs is facing issues with Apple’s App Store regarding its mobile wallet.

articles.title: Major Web3 Domain Provider Now Accepts Dogecoin (DOGE) As Payment Option
articles.description: One of the largest Web3 domain providers in the world is now accepting the popular meme asset Dogecoin (DOGE) as an option for payments. In a new announcement, major Web3 domain provider Unstoppable Domains says that it will now be adding DOGE to its list of digital assets that are now accepted as payment options. […]

articles.title: Base integrates Chainlink for secure off-chain price feeds
articles.description: Base Testnet, a new Ethereum L2 developed by Coinbase, has integrated Chainlink to provide secure off-chain price feeds for developers.

articles.title: ConsenSys announces public testing of ZK-Rollup network compatible with Ethereum
articles.description: Blockchain development firm ConsenSys said public testing of the zkEVM rollup network will commence on Mar. 28.

articles.title: Uniswap Wants to Launch Crypto Wallet App, but Apple Says Not So Fast
articles.description: The company behind the top decentralized exchange said Apple is standing in the way of the offering.

articles.title: Solana Pledges New Upgrades For Stability As It Looks To Start On Clean Slate – Could SOL Turn Super Bullish?
articles.description: Solana’s community is bracing for a wave of upgrades to the network barely one week after its 1.14 update, but this time the focus is not on speed or scalability.

articles.title: Aave starts governance discussion to deploy on upcoming Polygon zkEVM mainnet
articles.description: Aave, the decentralized lending (DeFi) lending protocol, is considering deploying a minimum viable version (MVP) of Aave version 3 on Polygon's zkEVM.
